title: JSON Array to String cast adds extra single quotes
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Question
When casting a JSON subcolumn to String, the result depends on its dynamic type.
If the subcolumn type is Array, casting via ::String adds extra single quotes around array elements, which changes the original data representation.
Using toJSONString() preserves the correct JSON for arrays, but if the dynamic type is String, it wraps the value in extra double quotes.
Is this behavior expected, and is there a recommended way to convert JSON subcolumns to text without changing the original data, regardless of whether the dynamic type is String or Array?
Example:
https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/3515f1da-70fd-4f1b-80a0-24d525e12887
```sql
CREATE TABLE json_test (
json JSON
) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO json_test VALUES
('{"a": "test"}'),
('{"a": ["test", {"c": [1]}]}');
SELECT
json.a::String AS string,
toJSONString(json.a) AS json_string,
if(
startsWith(dynamicType(json.a), 'Array'),
toJSONString(json.a),
json.a::String
) AS correct
FROM json_test;
```
| string               | json_string        | correct            |
|----------------------|--------------------|--------------------|
| test                 | "test"             | test               |
| ['test','{"c":[1]}'] | ["test",{"c":[1]}] | ["test",{"c":[1]}] |
key_bug_features: Casting JSON Array to String adds extra single quotes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE json_test_1 (json JSON) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE json_test_2 (id UInt32, json JSON) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT json.a::String AS string, toJSONString(json.a) AS json_string FROM json_test_1;
